name: Authentication
clinicItems: 3 roles with scoped views (Patient, Coordinator, Surgeon)
gaps: Can patients apply without an account, or must they register first?
Permissions matrix: what can each clinic role see and do?
What does the first-login experience look like for a new patient?

name: Application / Intake
patientItems: 5-step wizard (procedure, about you, medical history, lifestyle, review)
Application submitted confirmation with next steps
clinicItems: Application queue with tabs (pending, approved, declined, more info requested)
Patient detail view (medical history, lifestyle, body measurements, BMI)
Approve / decline / request more info actions
gaps: "Request more info" return flow: what does the patient see? Message or reopened form?
Decline flow: does the patient see a reason? Can they reapply?
"Not sure yet" free consult: how is the 30-min video consult scheduled?
BMI eligibility: what happens if BMI is below threshold?

name: Dashboard
patientItems: Pre-op checklist with links to relevant screens
clinicItems: Today's surgeries list (time, patient, procedure, OR room, status)

name: Scheduling
patientItems: Monthly calendar view with available dates
Time slot picker (4 slots per day with descriptions)
clinicItems: Surgery event blocks (patient, procedure, OR room, duration)
gaps: Who sets which dates/time slots are available for booking? No availability editor shown
Rescheduling flow: what does the patient see? Back to calendar picker?
Booking confirmation: email? calendar invite? SMS reminder chain?
Time zone: US patients across 4 time zones see Tijuana (Pacific) local times. Show both?

name: Diet Plan
patientItems: 5-phase plan view (liver shrinking, clear liquids, hospital, full liquid, pureed)
Phase timeline with current phase + progress bar
Meal cards (time, name, calories, protein, ingredients)
Daily nutrition targets with progress bars
Supplements list with brands and dosages
clinicItems: Diet plan templates (one per procedure type)
View/assign diet plan template to patient
gaps: How is the diet plan assigned to a patient? Auto from procedure, or clinic assigns manually?
How do diet plan dates auto-calculate from the actual surgery date?
"Ask Sofia" quick link: is this a message to coordinator, or an AI chatbot?

name: Travel & Stay
patientItems: Airport pickup selection (SAN van, TIJ direct, self-arrange)
Hotel room type selection (standard, premium +$420, family +$890)
Companion info (name, relationship, phone, dietary preferences)
clinicItems: View patient travel details in patient record
View companion info in patient record
gaps: How does the clinic coordinate airport pickups? Who schedules the van?
How are hotel reservations confirmed with Hotel Sereno?
How does the clinic mark a patient as "arrived"?

name: Documents & Consent
patientItems: View document status (awaiting signature, not uploaded, complete)
Download clinic PDFs (pre-op guide, diet plan, recovery guide, travel pack)
clinicItems: Document templates (discharge summary, lab order, travel pack)
gaps: Does the surgeon need to countersign informed consent?
How are merge-field document templates (discharge summary, lab order) generated per patient?

name: Payment
patientItems: Pay in full via Stripe (5% discount)
Deposit $500 via Stripe + balance on arrival
Card payment form (name, number, expiry, CVC)
gaps: "Deposit + balance": how is the in-person balance recorded and linked to the Stripe deposit?
"Pay on arrival": no financial commitment online. What prevents no-shows?
Financing option: which partner (Affirm? CareCredit?)? In scope for Phase 1?
Stripe US or Stripe Mexico? Affects currency, payouts, and CFDI invoices
Who initiates refunds? Full auto or admin approval required?

name: Messaging
clinicItems: Quick reply templates (schedule call, send guide, refer to coordinator)
"Open profile" button to jump to patient detail
gaps: Which automated messages send and when? Full trigger list needed
Conversation assignment: which staff member handles which patient threads?

name: Progress Tracking
patientItems: Weight chart (actual vs projected line chart)
Daily check-in form (weight, mood, water, walking, notes)
Milestones timeline (started diet, lost 5kg, surgery, lost 10kg, etc.)
clinicItems: Weight loss column in patient roster
Next milestone column in patient roster
gaps: Overdue check-in workflow: who contacts the patient? How is it logged and cleared?

name: Aftercare
patientItems: Each item: timing, title, date/time, format, agenda
clinicItems: Patient stage tabs in roster (pre-op, recovery, follow-up, discharged)
Follow-up stage labels per patient (3mo, 6mo, 12mo, overdue)
gaps: Are follow-up appointments auto-generated from surgery date, or manually created?
"Reschedule" button: opens calendar picker, or goes through coordinator?
Where do surgeons document clinical notes from follow-up consults?

name: Profile & Settings
patientItems: Personal info (name, DOB, gender, preferred name, photo)
Contact info (email, phone, address, emergency contact)
Care team display (lead surgeon, assisting surgeon, coordinator)
Language, timezone, date format, measurement system
clinicItems: Practice info (name, surgeon, license, RFC, address, phone, email)
Patient portal branding (name, logo, color, URL, email sender)

name: Patient Roster
clinicItems: Patient list with stage tabs (pre-op, recovery, follow-up, discharged)
Table: patient, procedure, stage, surgery date, weight loss, next milestone, last activity

name: Help Center
patientItems: Static FAQ page with accordion sections

name: Notifications
patientItems: Email notifications (application status, new messages, appointment reminders)
clinicItems: Email notifications (new application, payment received, document uploaded)
Badge counts on sidebar nav items (applications, messages)
gaps: Which email service? SendGrid? Postmark?
Full list of notification types and triggers needed

name: HIPAA Compliance
clinicItems: Role-based access (3 roles with scoped views)
gaps: Hosting decision: Supabase HIPAA add-on, or AWS direct?

name: Video Consultations
patientItems: Built-in video call from messages (Zoom Healthcare integration)
clinicItems: Built-in video call from patient thread (Zoom Healthcare integration)
workaround: Use Google Meet or Zoom links manually

name: Integrations
clinicItems: Google Calendar sync (OR schedule to personal calendars)
workaround: Staff check OR calendar in-app; export CSV for accounting

name: Advanced Analytics
clinicItems: Patient outcome analytics (avg weight loss, complication rates)

name: Earnings Page
clinicItems: Revenue bar chart with period toggles
workaround: Use accounting software for revenue tracking

name: Advanced Diet Features
clinicItems: Diet compliance view per patient (which phase, following it?)
Diet plan CMS editor (create/edit meals, macros, shopping lists)
Mexico store localization (Mexican patients need local store options)

name: Progress Enhancements
clinicItems: Patient progress detail view (weight chart, photos, measurements)
Anomaly detection / clinical alerts (rapid weight gain, missed check-ins)

name: Travel Management (Clinic)
clinicItems: Travel dashboard (all arrivals by date, pickups, hotel bookings)
workaround: View travel details per patient in their record

name: Aftercare Management (Clinic)
clinicItems: Auto-generated follow-up appointments from surgery date
Aftercare compliance tracking (who attended, who missed)
Lab order generation for follow-up labs
workaround: Track follow-ups via patient roster stage tabs

name: Team Management
clinicItems: Staff invitation flow with role assignment

name: Template System
clinicItems: Full template editor UI (diet plans, consent forms, documents)

name: Infrastructure & QA
clinicItems: DB schema design, CI/CD, hosting setup, testing, bug fixes, polish
